title: iris capnoides
intro: Iris capnoides, also known as the Alpine Iris or Pseudorchis albida, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. The medicinal properties of Iris capnoides are attributed to its rhizome and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been used to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to clear mucus and reduce inflammation in the airways. Herbal preparations of Iris capnoides can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties and provide additional health benefits.
